rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Explore subagent requires model claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 which may not be available on all API keys, causing immediate API errors","scope":"subagent/Explore"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"@kody-ade/engine is an external npm package, not local source code in node_modules — searching local node_modules for it will fail","scope":"kody engine"},{"kind":"decision","text":"PR title derivation confirmed: ship stage reads task.md first line heading via heading.replace(/^#\\s*/, '').trim() and slices to 72 chars","scope":"ship stage"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Verification tasks in build stage may find nothing to implement if behavior is already correct; plan should account for this","scope":"verification tasks"}]}
